title: Gamemode Menu Permission Bypass
description: Bypass the client-side permission check for F3 + N and F3 + F4
body:
# Gamemode Menu Permission Bypass
> *This really needs a better name*

This mod bypasses the *client-side* check for the built-in keybinds `F3 + N` and `F3 + F4`. Useful for servers where you want to switch gamemodes easily but where you are not opped (and thus can't use the keybind)
